title: Senior Product Manager
summary: Senior Product Manager driving enterprise transformation across AI, developer experience, compliance, healthcare, and fintech portfolios, with measurable operational and revenue impact.
achievements: Set evaluation and prioritization criteria for AI assistant workflows for a global leader in automotive technology, then led MVP delivery across multi-source enterprise knowledge systems to improve response quality.

Directed API and developer-experience modernization for a leading US telecom provider from internal standards to external readiness, improving API discoverability and accelerating promotion to external audiences.
Led cross-product healthcare fleet management portal strategy and execution for a major medical device manufacturer, with projected first year savings of $8-10M from self-service workflow adoption.

Led fintech workflow and KYC redesign across B2B2C flows, contributing to 40% call center load reduction, 35% operational cost reduction, and 70% fraud reduction while meeting NACHA and CFPB compliance deadlines.

title: Product Strategist
summary: Product Strategist leading client-facing transformation initiatives and productized strategy programs, from KPI architecture through roadmap decisions.
achievements: Led white-label cloud services redesign for a major telecom services provider, translating falling satisfaction signals into data-backed roadmap decisions.
Led executive workshops and ethnographic/UX research synthesis to align business-product goals, define KPIs, and drive roadmap prioritization decisions.
Productized the Product Kickstart workshop series to standardize idea-to-MVP decision and execution flow across client engagements.

title: Product Manager
summary: Product Manager for no-code and web3 platform initiatives, including ICO enablement, partner pilots, and protocol launches.
achievements: Defined UX and functionality for a low-code/no-code platform and companion developer-facing web framework.
Led launch of a KYC and token-generation platform used to execute the company's own ICO.
Led decentralized pilot delivery with Warner Music, including partner alignment and next-stage workflow design.
Led GTM and testnet launch execution for Tally payment protocol and companion web app.

title: Product Manager
summary: Fractional product leadership for startups and enterprises across discovery, roadmapping, and execution alignment.
achievements: Led consulting engagements across startup and enterprise contexts, establishing repeatable discovery, roadmapping, and execution-alignment practices.

company: PwC + Google for Work Innovation Lab
title: Product Manager
summary: Product Manager driving pilot-to-production transformation of field-service operations through workflow redesign and cloud migration.
achievements: Owned key discovery tracks for Field Service Optimization, including user interviews, usability studies, and prioritization workshops.
Led workflow redesign and cloud migration planning, coordinating six external vendors and offshore delivery teams.
Contributed to projected $1.4M annual parts savings and reduced billing-cycle latency through system modernization.

title: Co-founder and CTO
summary: Co-founder and CTO leading discovery, requirements, and prototype delivery for a transparency-focused commercial real-estate platform.
achievements: Led product discovery and requirement definition for a commercial real-estate auction platform, delivering an accelerator-accepted prototype.

title: Manager, Product Development
summary: Product Development Manager leading telecom product delivery and retention-focused workflow redesign.
achievements: Led delivery of value-added SMS products for telecom providers worldwide, enabling feature phones with smartphone-like service experiences.
Led telecom portal redesign based on attrition-pattern analysis, resulting in a 60% reduction in customer attrition.

title: Technical Product Manager
summary: Technical Product Manager who built US delivery capability and scaled API-driven campaign integrations.
achievements: Built US technical delivery capacity as first technical hire, leading PRD and PoC execution and API-integrated campaign delivery.

title: Software Development Roles
